Not every heart heals at the same speed.
Someone may miss you quietly tonight.
A memory of old love may return unexpectedly today.
The silence between messages may feel unusually loud tonight.
You may feel nostalgic for a connection that changed you.
Even loneliness carries traces of love once given.
A bittersweet emotion may linger beneath tonight’s warmth.
The stars whisper softly about hearts still healing.
Love sometimes leaves echoes long after it ends.
The universe whispers: 'To feel deeply is still a gift.'
